scope.slice: M4-C.1 (M4-C boundary slice: IProviderRegistry contract + ProviderDescriptor record + ProviderFamily + ProviderStatus enums + 6 family registry contracts + SystemProviderRegistry implementation + 6 family fakes + AddProviderRegistry composition root + 9+ unit tests)
scope.plan: .ai/plans/M4-C-provider-registry-foundation.md (12 sections; Status: Approved 2026-07-13 via the brief)
scope.branch: feature/T-028-m4-c-1-provider-registry-contract-and-family-registries (created from main at the M4-B closeout commit 72d85b3; the M4-C.1 closeout commit feat(m4-c.1): add IProviderRegistry contract, family registries, SystemProviderRegistry implementation, family fakes, and AddProviderRegistry composition root is on this branch; the branch is fast-forwarded into main per the branching strategy rule 6; the branch is deleted per rule 7)
in_scope: Ship the IProviderRegistry contract in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Providers/ (the single DI seam for provider lookup; Task<IReadOnlyList<ProviderDescriptor>> ListProvidersAsync(ProviderFamily, CancellationToken)).
Ship the ProviderDescriptor sealed record in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Providers/ (Id, DisplayName, Family, Status, Version, Metadata).
Ship the ProviderFamily enum in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Providers/ (6 values: Git, AgentRuntime, Review, QualityGate, AutonomousLoop, Orchestration).
Ship the ProviderStatus enum in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Providers/ (3 values: Available, Unavailable, Disabled).

Ship the IProviderFamily base family interface + the 6 family registry contracts (IGitProviderFamily, IAgentRuntimeProviderFamily, IReviewProviderFamily, IQualityGateProviderFamily, IAutonomousLoopProviderFamily, IOrchestrationProviderFamily) in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Providers/Families/.

Ship the SystemProviderRegistry implementation in src/AiEng.Platform.Infrastructure/Providers/ (aggregates the 6 family registries; consumes IHostCapabilitiesService through DI; downgrades Available descriptors to Unavailable when the family capability is not available; logs at Information level).

Ship the 6 no-op family stub implementations in src/AiEng.Platform.Infrastructure/Providers/Families/ (each returns Array.Empty<ProviderDescriptor>(); the stubs are the M4-C.1 boundary; M4-D replaces them with concrete providers).
Ship the AddProviderRegistry composition root extension in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/Providers/ (registers the 6 family stubs + IProviderRegistry via TryAddSingleton).
Wire AddProviderRegistry into AddPlatformServices in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs after AddHostCapabilities().
Ship the 6 family fakes in tests/AiEng.Platform.UnitTests/Providers/ (Fake{Prefix}ProviderFamily; record CallCount; queue and return IReadOnlyList<ProviderDescriptor>).

Ship 19 unit tests in tests/AiEng.Platform.UnitTests/Providers/SystemProviderRegistryTests.cs (constructor-null tests for all 7 dependencies; happy-path family_capability_available; happy-path family_capability_not_available (downgrade); preserve Disabled; empty family; cancellation propagation; Information-level log; per-family dispatch; IHostCapabilitiesService one-call-per-invocation; ArgumentOutOfRangeException for unknown family; FakeGitProviderFamily CallCount).

Update the project-continuity state per Rule 15: session.json (this file), tasks.json (T-028 transitions Ready to InProgress to Done with the full evidence block; T-029 M4-C.2 stub row added in Ready), current.md, task-board.md, milestones.json (M4-C.1 slice block from Planned to Done; M4-C milestone Awaiting Approval to Active; C-018 evidence block finalised; C-010 + C-011 evidence blocks initialised), capabilities.json (C-018 evidence block finalised; C-010 + C-011 evidence blocks initialised; top-level updated_at + updated_by_session updated).

Write the M4-C.1 handoff at .ai/handoffs/2026-07-13-m4-c-1-provider-registry-contract-and-family-registries.md (mirrored to .ai/handoffs/latest.md). 8 sections mirroring the M4-B.1 + M4-B.2 + M4-B.3 + M4-B closeout handoffs. Use unix2dos to convert to CRLF.

Write the M4-C.1 implementation report at implementation-report-m4-c-1-provider-registry-contract-and-family-registries.md (15+ sections mirroring the M4-B.1 + M4-B.2 + M4-B.3 implementation reports). Use unix2dos to convert to CRLF.
